zh.Taillebourg, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利塔爾波格
zh.Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes,: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre於1220年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c時，她的父親Archambaud VIII de Bourbon31歲，母親Béatrix de Montluçon24歲。她於1240年4月與Jean Ier de Dreux結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1274年8月24日在法國崔艾-吉洛易德享年54歲，埋葬在法國崔艾-吉洛易德。

zh-hans.Taillebourg, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利塔爾波格
zh-hans.Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes,: 法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre于1220年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c时，她的父亲Archambaud VIII de Bourbon31岁，母亲Béatrix de Montluçon24岁。她于1240年4月与Jean Ier de Dreux结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1274年8月24日在法国崔艾-吉洛易德享年54岁，埋葬在法国崔艾-吉洛易德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre was born in 1220, in Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, was 31 and her mother, Béatrix de Montluçon, was 24. She married Jean Ier de Dreux in April 1240. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 24 August 1274, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre est née en 1220, à Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Montluçon, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Jean Ier de Dreux en avril 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1274, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre 1220 in Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archambaud VIII de Bourbon 31 und ihre Mutter Béatrix de Montluçon 24. Sie hat im April 1240 Jean Ier de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. August 1274 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich und wurde in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre è nata il nel 1220 nel Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Béatrix de Montluçon, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Jean Ier de Dreux nel aprile 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 agosto 1274, nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Bourbon-Dampierreが1220年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールモントルcオンで生まれた時，父Archambaud VIII de Bourbonは31歳，母Béatrix de Montluçonは24歳であった。1240年4月にJean Ier de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1274年8月24日にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで54歳で死去し，フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre(이)가 1220년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 몽루c에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archambaud VIII de Bourbon(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrix de Montluçon(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1240년 4월 Jean Ier de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 8월 24일 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre nasceu em 1220, em Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Montluçon, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean Ier de Dreux em abril de 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1274, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre родилась в 1220 г. в местности монтлуcон, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Archambaud VIII de Bourbon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Montluçon, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean Ier de Dreux апрель 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 августа 1274 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre nació en 1220, en Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Montluçon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jean Ier de Dreux en abril de 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1274, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.
